ConsolePastel.name: ConsolePastel
ConsolePastel.desc: ConsolePastel is a tool built using JavaScript which allows you to log text to the console in different colours and styles with the help of escape sequences.

ChessParse.name: ChessParse
ChessParse.desc: ChessParse is a web app which fetches the ratings of any player on chess.com given their username. The rating info for all available time formats is listed.

PeththaScript.name: PeththaScript
PeththaScript.desc: PeththaScript is a meme language built using Node JS. It includes a few basic functions and very limited functionality with a custom syntax.

LazarusChat.name: LazarusChat
LazarusChat.desc: LazarusChat is a WhatsApp chat export reader which takes the media included zips or text file exports from WhatsApp and presents it in a familiar chat interface.

Infroid Coder.name: Infroid Coder
Infroid Coder.desc: The portfolio website for Infroid Coder. Built with only pure HTML, CSS and JS, this website was built to showcase details, projects and skills of Infroid Coder.
